text: Facility Trust Desk — built for non-technical NGO planners, on Databricks Free Edition.
Every capability in this data is a claim, not a fact. The planner picks a care need and a region.
Ranked by evidence: corroborated, claimed only, or honestly unknown.
Row-level citations: the exact sentences behind every rating.
The app double-checks its own work — our validator overturned 378 of our own ratings.
No ground truth exists, so humans stay in charge: signed overrides, remembered for the team.
755 districts, joined with the official NFHS-5 health survey.
Solid red: proven unmet need. Hollow gray: unknown. A data desert is not a medical desert.
One click: an evidence-cited Decision Brief — a decision the team can defend.
Databricks Apps · serverless SQL · Genie · MLflow — live on Free Edition.
